description_long: This house is a single-story residential building surrounded by a dense ring of mature deciduous trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The structure features a low-pitched, hip-style roof in a dark gray color, with a main section and an attached garage or extension on one side. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in painted siding or stucco, and the house sits on a raised platform or deck that extends around the perimeter. The windows are modest in size and appear to be symmetrically placed, though partially obscured by the surrounding foliage. The main entryway is set back and partially hidden by trees, with a small porch or stoop visible in front of the door.
description: A single-story house with a hip roof, light exterior walls, and an attached garage, surrounded by dense deciduous trees and set on a raised deck. The structure is private and blends into a leafy suburban environment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, attached garage, and dense tree coverage along the front and sides.
description_view_1: Side view with the garage more prominent and the house partially obscured by trees, highlighting the continuous tree barrier.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house and deck visible, surrounded by trees, with fewer architectural details exposed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house volume and tree coverage, with the entryway less visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small porch or stoop, partially obscured by trees, no prominent columns or overhangs.
